title: Üsküdar University External Stakeholder Survey
content:
Üsküdar University External Stakeholder Survey

Dear Participant

Our external stakeholder survey will be open until February 07, 2025 in order to continuously improve the education-training, research-development and social responsibility activities of our university and to achieve the desired success of the Strategic Plan for 2024-2028 on our website. Thank you for your participation in our external stakeholder survey.

External Stakeholder Survey Official Letter

Üsküdar University 2024-2028 Strategic Plan Circular
